description_long: This is a digital representation of an adult pedestrian, depicted in a dynamic walking pose with one leg forward and arms slightly bent at the sides. The figure is dressed in fitted, casual attire, including a short-sleeved top and long pants, with the clothing closely following the contours of the body. The posture suggests forward motion, with the torso slightly leaning and the head facing ahead. The figure's proportions are realistic, with defined limbs and a naturalistic stance. The feet are clad in low-profile shoes, and the hairstyle is short and neat, with no visible accessories or carried items. The overall form is streamlined, with smooth surfaces and minimal textural detail.
description: A walking adult figure in casual, fitted clothing with a short hairstyle and low-profile shoes, depicted in a natural stride. The posture and attire suggest a typical urban pedestrian.
description_view_0: The figure is seen from the left side, showing the forward stride of the left leg and the bent right arm, with the head and torso in profile.
description_view_1: The figure is viewed from the back-left, highlighting the back contours, both arms, and the trailing right leg.
description_view_2: The figure is seen from the right side, displaying the right leg forward and the left arm bent, with the head and torso in profile.
description_view_3: The figure is viewed from the back-right, showing the back, both arms, and the stride of the left leg.
attribute_clothing_type: short-sleeved fitted top and long pants
